name: Koma (1/53 octave)
note: Single comma step in 53-division pedagogical models.

name: Bakiyye (4 commas)
note: Common small second in Arel-Ezgi-Uzdilek descriptions.

name: Kucuk Mucennep (5 commas)
note: Small whole-step class in many makam analyses.

name: Buyuk Mucennep (6 commas)
note: Larger neutral-second-like class in many makam analyses.

name: Arabic Neutral Second
note: Representative neutral second used in many maqam teaching contexts.

name: Arabic Neutral Third
note: Representative neutral third used in many maqam teaching contexts.

name: Sikah-type Neutral Step
note: Common pedagogical proxy for steps around Sikah-oriented jins structures.

name: Small Tone
tradition: Arabic maqam and Persian dastgah pedagogies
note: Small whole-tone class used in interval descriptions.

name: Large Tone
tradition: Arabic maqam and Persian dastgah pedagogies
note: Large whole-tone class used in interval descriptions.

name: Koron-Altered Step
note: Representative interval class associated with koron-inflected scale degrees.

name: Sori-Altered Step
note: Representative interval class associated with sori-inflected scale degrees.
